meaning: n.不同意者,非国教派的人,反对者
examples: The role of the dissenter is not for the weak - kneed.
One prominent dissenter, Nikolas Salagiannis, said the reshuffle had generated a slim hope.
Known as "The Great Dissenter," he wrote Supreme Court opinions that continue to shape American jurisprudence.
As has been the case recently, Bernanke faced a lone dissenter in the FOMC.
Harry was the one dissenter who was going to blow the whistle on the rhapsody of Brigadoon.
